TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kanakanavu, story: kkvNr_frog_Uva
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: eh sua taa pomomuara mahin ia 'una manu tinpuru ia mataa tamtituin 'enia pungana 'enia takarura.
S.PHON: eh sua taa pomomuar~ɾa mahin ia ʔuna manu tinpur~ɾu ia mataa tamtituin ʔenia puŋana ʔenia takar~ɾur~ɾa.
S.FORM: eh sua taa pomomuara mahin ia 'una manu tinpuru ia mataa tamtituin 'enia pungana 'enia takarura.
S.PHON: eh sua taa pomomuar~ɾa mahin ia ʔuna manu tinpur~ɾu ia mataa tamtituin ʔenia puŋana ʔenia takar~ɾur~ɾa.
S.TRANSL: 現在要聊的是一個小孩和他的狗坐著,還有一個水缸和青蛙.
Now we are going to talk about a child sitting with his dog. There is an urn and a frog.

S.FORM: 'ena pungana takarura.
S.PHON: ʔena puŋana takar~ɾur~ɾa.
S.FORM: 'ena pungana takarura.
S.PHON: ʔena puŋana takar~ɾur~ɾa.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙在水缸裡面.
The frog is in the urn.

S.FORM: uh tanaheen isi 'una vuan sua ihi ia ʉncoo sinangin sinangin misee.
S.PHON: uh tanaheen isi ʔuna vuan sua ihi ia ɨnʦoo sinaŋin sinaŋin misee.
S.FORM: uh tanaheen isi 'una vuan sua ihi ia ʉncoo sinangin sinangin misee.
S.PHON: uh tanaheen isi ʔuna vuan sua ihi ia ɨnʦoo sinaŋin sinaŋin misee.
S.TRANSL: 這是他的家,月亮是他的照明.我想應該是照明吧.
This is his home. There exists the moon which is his lighting. I think it must be the lighting.

S.FORM: eh muhacu cu muhacu nesi ia se'ecʉpʉ manu iha tatarʉ.
S.PHON: eh muhaʦu ʦu muhaʦu nesi ia seʔeʦɨpɨ manu iha tatar~ɾɨ.
S.FORM: eh muhacu cu muhacu nesi ia se'ecʉpʉ manu iha tatarʉ.
S.PHON: eh muhaʦu ʦu muhaʦu nesi ia seʔeʦɨpɨ manu iha tatar~ɾɨ.
S.TRANSL: 在這裡,那個小孩在床舖睡覺.
Here the child slept in the bed.

S.FORM: se'ecʉpʉ 'e tikirimi ʉh aramia'ʉ cumu'ʉra ʉh takarura nimon nimusikarʉ na pungana.
S.PHON: seʔeʦɨpɨ ʔe tikir~ɾimi ɨh ar~ɾamiaʔɨ ʦumuʔɨr~ɾa ɨh takar~ɾur~ɾa nimon nimusikar~ɾɨ na puŋana.
S.FORM: se'ecʉpʉ 'e tikirimi ʉh aramia'ʉ cumu'ʉra ʉh takarura nimon nimusikarʉ na pungana.
S.PHON: seʔeʦɨpɨ ʔe tikir~ɾimi ɨh ar~ɾamiaʔɨ ʦumuʔɨr~ɾa ɨh takar~ɾur~ɾa nimon nimusikar~ɾɨ na puŋana.

TRANSL.notes: 睡醒之後,(男孩)在尋找曾經掉到那個水缸裡面的青蛙.

S.TRANSL: 睡醒之後, 在尋找曾經掉到那個水缸裡面的青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: After sleeping, (the boy) was seeking the frog which had dropped into the urn.

S.TRANSL: After sleeping, was seeking the frog which had dropped into the urn.

S.FORM: nimusika nimusikarʉ na pungana tia arapapining.
S.PHON: nimusika nimusikar~ɾɨ na puŋana tia ar~ɾapapiniŋ.
S.FORM: nimusika nimusikarʉ na pungana tia arapapining.
S.PHON: nimusika nimusikar~ɾɨ na puŋana tia ar~ɾapapiniŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 曾經掉入水缸的(青蛙),要出去.

S.TRANSL: 曾經掉入水缸的 ,要出去.

TRANSL.notes: (The frog) which had been dropped into the urn went out.

S.TRANSL: which had been dropped into the urn went out.

W.TRANSL: 變成-重疊-外面.主事焦點

S.FORM: aramia'ʉ manu isa tikirim.
S.PHON: ar~ɾamiaʔɨ manu isa tikir~ɾim.
S.FORM: aramia'ʉ manu isa tikirim.
S.PHON: ar~ɾamiaʔɨ manu isa tikir~ɾim.
S.TRANSL: 那位小孩醒來後四處找.
That child woke up and looked around.

S.FORM: makahuacu uh aramia'ʉ manu iat sua tamtituin ia 'esi na kukuceen.
S.PHON: makahuaʦu uh ar~ɾamiaʔɨ manu iat sua tamtituin ia ʔesi na kukuʦeen.
S.FORM: makahuacu uh aramia'ʉ manu iat sua tamtituin ia 'esi na kukuceen.
S.PHON: makahuaʦu uh ar~ɾamiaʔɨ manu iat sua tamtituin ia ʔesi na kukuʦeen.

TRANSL.notes: 之後(那個)小孩醒來,他的小狗在他的後面.

S.TRANSL: 之後 小孩醒來,他的小狗在他的後面.
Then the child woke up, and his dog was behind him.

S.FORM: aʉncee pungana ni'ona tamtitu nipu'ara'ang arapapining ta'anin kangvang.
S.PHON: aɨnʦee puŋana niʔona tamtitu nipuʔar~ɾaʔaŋ ar~ɾapapiniŋ taʔanin kaŋvaŋ.
S.FORM: aʉncee pungana ni'ona tamtitu nipu'ara'ang arapapining ta'anin kangvang.
S.PHON: aɨnʦee puŋana niʔona tamtitu nipuʔar~ɾaʔaŋ ar~ɾapapiniŋ taʔanin kaŋvaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 水缸在這裡啊,本來待在這裡跑出去的小狗也在這裡啊,椅子全在這裡啊
Here is the urn! The dog that had been outstayed.

S.FORM: ʉncaa nguain tamna kucu manu tamna kucu.
S.PHON: ɨnʦaa ŋuain tamna kuʦu manu tamna kuʦu.
S.FORM: ʉncaa nguain tamna kucu manu tamna kucu.
S.PHON: ɨnʦaa ŋuain tamna kuʦu manu tamna kuʦu.
S.TRANSL: 那邊有他的鞋子,那個小孩的鞋子.
There are his shoes, the kid's shoes.

S.FORM: eh makasuacu sua tamtitu iha nimusikarʉ na pungana 'an tavarʉ'ʉ arapapining.
S.PHON: eh makasuaʦu sua tamtitu iha nimusikar~ɾɨ na puŋana ʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ ar~ɾapapiniŋ.
S.FORM: eh makasuacu sua tamtitu iha nimusikarʉ na pungana 'an tavarʉ'ʉ arapapining.
S.PHON: eh makasuaʦu sua tamtitu iha nimusikar~ɾɨ na puŋana ʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ ar~ɾapapiniŋ.
S.TRANSL: 那之後,在甕裡面的那隻小狗無法出來.
After that, the dog inside the urn couldn't get out of it.

S.FORM: eh manu isi cʉrʉʉn kee carapungin.
S.PHON: eh manu isi ʦɨr~ɾɨɨn kee ʦar~ɾapuŋin.
S.FORM: eh manu isi cʉrʉʉn kee carapungin.
S.PHON: eh manu isi ʦɨr~ɾɨɨn kee ʦar~ɾapuŋin.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩,他看著他的帽子.
This kid, he looked at his hat.

S.FORM: 'an tara'ʉ makacarapung si nimusikarʉ na pungana.
S.PHON: ʔan tar~ɾaʔɨ makaʦar~ɾapuŋ si nimusikar~ɾɨ na puŋana.
S.FORM: 'an tara'ʉ makacarapung si nimusikarʉ na pungana.
S.PHON: ʔan tar~ɾaʔɨ makaʦar~ɾapuŋ si nimusikar~ɾɨ na puŋana.

TRANSL.notes: 他不能戴帽子,因為(帽子)掉到水缸裡.

S.TRANSL: 他不能戴帽子,因為 掉到水缸裡.
He couldn't wear the hat because it had dropped into the urn.

S.FORM: 'enia kan ta'anin.
S.PHON: ʔenia kan taʔanin.
S.FORM: 'enia kan ta'anin.
S.PHON: ʔenia kan taʔanin.
S.TRANSL: 他的椅子在那邊.
It said that his chair was there.

S.FORM: makahuacu mosa manu iha na si'inʉva.
S.PHON: makahuaʦu mosa manu iha na siʔinɨva.
S.FORM: makahuacu mosa manu iha na si'inʉva.
S.PHON: makahuaʦu mosa manu iha na siʔinɨva.
S.TRANSL: 在那之後,那個小孩到門口.
After that, that kid went to the door.

S.FORM: pokari 'akia kan nguain tamna takarura.
S.PHON: pokar~ɾi ʔakia kan ŋuain tamna takar~ɾur~ɾa.
S.FORM: pokari 'akia kan nguain tamna takarura.
S.PHON: pokar~ɾi ʔakia kan ŋuain tamna takar~ɾur~ɾa.

TRANSL.notes: (男孩)大叫說他的青蛙不見了.

S.TRANSL: 大叫說他的青蛙不見了.

TRANSL.notes: (The kid) shouted that his frog had disappeared.

S.TRANSL: shouted that his frog had disappeared.

S.FORM: maracococua mataa tamtituin.
S.PHON: mar~ɾaʦoʦoʦua mataa tamtituin.
S.FORM: maracococua mataa tamtituin.
S.PHON: mar~ɾaʦoʦoʦua mataa tamtituin.
S.TRANSL: 一直和他的狗一起走.
He kept walking with his doggy.

S.FORM: ʉh tamtitu ia nimusikarʉ 'inia pungana 'an tarʉ'ʉ pokarikari.
S.PHON: ɨh tamtitu ia nimusikar~ɾɨ ʔinia puŋana ʔan tar~ɾɨʔɨ pokar~ɾikar~ɾi.
S.FORM: ʉh tamtitu ia nimusikarʉ 'inia pungana 'an tarʉ'ʉ pokarikari.
S.PHON: ɨh tamtitu ia nimusikar~ɾɨ ʔinia puŋana ʔan tar~ɾɨʔɨ pokar~ɾikar~ɾi.
S.TRANSL: 小狗掉入水缸那裡,不能叫.
The dog dropped into the urn and could not call out.

S.FORM: ʉh 'ecu metetarʉ tikirimikee nguain ʉh takarura 'akia.
S.PHON: ɨh ʔeʦu metetar~ɾɨ tikir~ɾimikee ŋuain ɨh takar~ɾur~ɾa ʔakia.
S.FORM: ʉh 'ecu metetarʉ tikirimikee nguain ʉh takarura 'akia.
S.PHON: ɨh ʔeʦu metetar~ɾɨ tikir~ɾimikee ŋuain ɨh takar~ɾur~ɾa ʔakia.

TRANSL.notes: (男孩)已經一直等了,尋找他的不見的青蛙.

S.TRANSL: 已經一直等了,尋找他的不見的青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: (The kid) kept waiting, and looked for his lost frog.

S.TRANSL: kept waiting, and looked for his lost frog.

S.FORM: mononangcu na si'inʉveen.
S.PHON: mononaŋʦu na siʔinɨveen.
S.FORM: mononangcu na si'inʉveen.
S.PHON: mononaŋʦu na siʔinɨveen.

TRANSL.notes: (男孩)一直安靜地待在他的門口.

S.TRANSL: 一直安靜地待在他的門口.

TRANSL.notes: (The kid) stayed still at the door.

S.TRANSL: stayed still at the door.

S.FORM: 'esi meranasʉ tamtitu i nimusikarʉ na pungana 'an tara arapapining.
S.PHON: ʔesi mer~ɾanasɨ tamtitu i nimusikar~ɾɨ na puŋana ʔan tar~ɾa ar~ɾapapiniŋ.
S.FORM: 'esi meranasʉ tamtitu i nimusikarʉ na pungana 'an tara arapapining.
S.PHON: ʔesi mer~ɾanasɨ tamtitu i nimusikar~ɾɨ na puŋana ʔan tar~ɾa ar~ɾapapiniŋ.
S.TRANSL: 這隻小狗很苦惱,他進入到水缸裡面沒有辦法出來了.
This distressed dog worried that it could not go out from the urn it had entered.

S.FORM: ʉh mecocuacu nesi niarapapiningcu tamtitu aio macangcangarʉ manu ia keriviin kee makasi.
S.PHON: ɨh meʦoʦuaʦu nesi niar~ɾapapiniŋʦu tamtitu aio maʦaŋʦaŋar~ɾɨ manu ia ker~ɾiviin kee makasi.
S.FORM: ʉh mecocuacu nesi niarapapiningcu tamtitu aio macangcangarʉ manu ia keriviin kee makasi.
S.PHON: ɨh meʦoʦuaʦu nesi niar~ɾapapiniŋʦu tamtitu aio maʦaŋʦaŋar~ɾɨ manu ia ker~ɾiviin kee makasi.
S.TRANSL: 兩個已經一起在這裡,小狗已經出來了,小孩非常高興把小狗這樣抱起來.
Those two has been together. The dog has been out of the urn. The kid was very happy and held the dog.

S.FORM: sii a nimusikarʉ na 'a satu'u a' satu'u 'a nencu maracocua mataa tamtitu mataa manu ihi.
S.PHON: sii a nimusikar~ɾɨ na ʔa satuʔu aʔ satuʔu ʔa nenʦu mar~ɾaʦoʦua mataa tamtitu mataa manu ihi.
S.FORM: sii a nimusikarʉ na 'a satu'u a' satu'u 'a nencu maracocua mataa tamtitu mataa manu ihi.
S.PHON: sii a nimusikar~ɾɨ na ʔa satuʔu aʔ satuʔu ʔa nenʦu mar~ɾaʦoʦua mataa tamtitu mataa manu ihi.
S.TRANSL: 因為曾經掉到箱子,嗯,對,箱子裡面.怎樣了?小狗和小孩走在一起

TRANSL.notes: Because (it) had dropped into the box... yeah, the box. How is it? The dog and the kid walked together.

S.TRANSL: Because had dropped into the box... yeah, the box. How is it? The dog and the kid walked together.

S.FORM: 'inakaru ʉh na ramisi 'ʉnʉ'ʉnai maracocua monia pokari takarura 'ekasu nan takarura arapapininga.
S.PHON: ʔinakar~ɾu ɨh na r~ɾamisi ʔɨnɨʔɨnai mar~ɾaʦoʦua monia pokar~ɾi takar~ɾur~ɾa ʔekasu nan takar~ɾur~ɾa ar~ɾapapiniŋa.
S.FORM: 'inakaru ʉh na ramisi 'ʉnʉ'ʉnai maracocua monia pokari takarura 'ekasu nan takarura arapapininga.
S.PHON: ʔinakar~ɾu ɨh na r~ɾamisi ʔɨnɨʔɨnai mar~ɾaʦoʦua monia pokar~ɾi takar~ɾur~ɾa ʔekasu nan takar~ɾur~ɾa ar~ɾapapiniŋa.
S.TRANSL: 在樹上,呃,在樹根那裡的地面上,兩個一起在那裡呼叫,青蛙,你在哪裡,青蛙,出來啊!
The stay in the tree, uh... at the tree, calling "Frog~~ where are you, frog, come on out."

W.TRANSL: 變成-重疊-外頭-祈使.主焦

S.FORM: 'a cʉ'ʉrenia karu ihi 'una uh tarako.
S.PHON: ʔa ʦɨʔɨr~ɾenia kar~ɾu ihi ʔuna uh tar~ɾako.
S.FORM: 'a cʉ'ʉrenia karu ihi 'una uh tarako.
S.PHON: ʔa ʦɨʔɨr~ɾenia kar~ɾu ihi ʔuna uh tar~ɾako.
S.TRANSL: 他看著這顆樹,啊,有個洞.
He looked at this tree. There is a hole.

S.FORM: 'una tarako a' eio 'unaava nesi anu nimutatin na karu.
S.PHON: ʔuna tar~ɾako aʔ eio ʔunaava nesi anu nimutatin na kar~ɾu.
S.FORM: 'una tarako a' eio 'unaava nesi anu nimutatin na karu.
S.PHON: ʔuna tar~ɾako aʔ eio ʔunaava nesi anu nimutatin na kar~ɾu.
S.TRANSL: 有個洞,啊呀!原來有個蜂窩掛在樹這裡!
There is a hole. Oh! So there is a beehive suspended here in the tree!

S.FORM: moninia tasa ihi.
S.PHON: moninia tasa ihi.
S.FORM: moninia tasa ihi.
S.PHON: moninia tasa ihi.
S.TRANSL: 這兩個人待在那裡.
These two stayed there.

S.FORM: mara na anu ia nimatapari'i tamtitu na canum.
S.PHON: mar~ɾa na anu ia nimatapar~ɾiʔi tamtitu na ʦanum.
S.FORM: mara na anu ia nimatapari'i tamtitu na canum.
S.PHON: mar~ɾa na anu ia nimatapar~ɾiʔi tamtitu na ʦanum.
S.TRANSL: 拿那個蜂窩,小狗掉到池塘裡面.
Holding that beehive, the dog dropped into the pool.

S.FORM: nimatapari na tamtitu ia nimatapari na canum.
S.PHON: nimatapar~ɾi na tamtitu ia nimatapar~ɾi na ʦanum.
S.FORM: nimatapari na tamtitu ia nimatapari na canum.
S.PHON: nimatapar~ɾi na tamtitu ia nimatapar~ɾi na ʦanum.
S.TRANSL: 那個狗掉到池塘裡面.
That dog dropped into the pool

S.FORM: 'eepania ʉh meranasʉ tamtitu ia tia asa matisa'ʉ ʉh anu ia.
S.PHON: ʔeepania ɨh mer~ɾanasɨ tamtitu ia tia asa matisaʔɨ ɨh anu ia.
S.FORM: 'eepania ʉh meranasʉ tamtitu ia tia asa matisa'ʉ ʉh anu ia.
S.PHON: ʔeepania ɨh mer~ɾanasɨ tamtitu ia tia asa matisaʔɨ ɨh anu ia.
S.TRANSL: 那隻小狗還在那邊掙扎,想要抓那個蜂窩.
That dog was still struggling and wanted to grasp the beehive.

S.FORM: ma'icʉpʉ 'una anu misee.
S.PHON: maʔiʦɨpɨ ʔuna anu misee.
S.FORM: ma'icʉpʉ 'una anu misee.
S.PHON: maʔiʦɨpɨ ʔuna anu misee.
S.TRANSL: 小孩在地上睡覺,小孩可能怕蜜蜂吧.
The kid slept on the floor. It appeared that he felt fear about bees.

S.FORM: makasuacu tia asa mopara 'inia nivatu ai monia manu ia pokari mataa tacau.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu tia asa mopar~ɾa ʔinia nivatu ai monia manu ia pokar~ɾi mataa taʦau.
S.FORM: makasuacu tia asa mopara 'inia nivatu ai monia manu ia pokari mataa tacau.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu tia asa mopar~ɾa ʔinia nivatu ai monia manu ia pokar~ɾi mataa taʦau.
S.TRANSL: 之後他想爬上去和小狗待在那裡呼喊.
Then the child wanted to come climbing up and stayed there, and then called with the dog.

S.FORM: 'ei niarapapining na canumu takarura isa.
S.PHON: ʔei niar~ɾapapiniŋ na ʦanumu takar~ɾur~ɾa isa.
S.FORM: 'ei niarapapining na canumu takarura isa.
S.PHON: ʔei niar~ɾapapiniŋ na ʦanumu takar~ɾur~ɾa isa.
S.TRANSL: 那個青蛙出現在水上.
That frog emerged from the water.

S.FORM: arakicacʉ manu ia 'ʉkʉrʉn kee ivicin makasi na.
S.PHON: ar~ɾakiʦaʦɨ manu ia ʔɨkɨr~ɾɨn kee iviʦin makasi na.
S.FORM: arakicacʉ manu ia 'ʉkʉrʉn kee ivicin makasi na.
S.PHON: ar~ɾakiʦaʦɨ manu ia ʔɨkɨr~ɾɨn kee iviʦin makasi na.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩嚇了一跳,他摀著他的嘴巴.
The kid was surprised, and he put his hands to his mouse.

S.FORM: capai kee arakicacʉ tu aio 'unaava anu nesi.
S.PHON: ʦapai kee ar~ɾakiʦaʦɨ tu aio ʔunaava anu nesi.
S.FORM: capai kee arakicacʉ tu aio 'unaava anu nesi.
S.PHON: ʦapai kee ar~ɾakiʦaʦɨ tu aio ʔunaava anu nesi.
S.TRANSL: He was surprised that so there are bees here!
他嚇了一跳,原來這裡有蜜蜂啊!

S.FORM: 'an ma'icʉpʉ tamtituin mon 'inia monacunia pokari a 'unaava tungingi 'una tungingi isi 'a cʉnra na tacau i.
S.PHON: ʔan maʔiʦɨpɨ tamtituin mon ʔinia monaʦunia pokar~ɾi a ʔunaava tuŋiŋi ʔuna tuŋiŋi isi ʔa ʦɨnr~ɾa na taʦau i.
S.FORM: 'an ma'icʉpʉ tamtituin mon 'inia monacunia pokari a 'unaava tungingi 'una tungingi isi 'a cʉnra na tacau i.
S.PHON: ʔan maʔiʦɨpɨ tamtituin mon ʔinia monaʦunia pokar~ɾi a ʔunaava tuŋiŋi ʔuna tuŋiŋi isi ʔa ʦɨnr~ɾa na taʦau i.

TRANSL.notes: 他的小狗不怕,待在那裡,就待在那裡了,(他)大叫這裡原來有老鼠,這個狗看到了.

S.TRANSL: 他的小狗不怕,待在那裡,就待在那裡了, 大叫這裡原來有老鼠,這個狗看到了.
His dog did not feel affraid and stayed there. Just stayed there. He shouted out that there was a mouse so! The dog saw it.

S.FORM: makaicu ne moca manu ia mosa na karu maringuna.
S.PHON: makaiʦu ne moʦa manu ia mosa na kar~ɾu mar~ɾiŋuna.
S.FORM: makaicu ne moca manu ia mosa na karu maringuna.
S.PHON: makaiʦu ne moʦa manu ia mosa na kar~ɾu mar~ɾiŋuna.
S.TRANSL: 好像是那個小孩往這裡走,又走去枯樹那裡.
It appealed that the child came here and went over the withered tree.

S.FORM: cʉmʉ'ʉra na tarako isa 'esikara nia nguain tamna takarura.
S.PHON: ʦɨmɨʔɨr~ɾa na tar~ɾako isa ʔesikar~ɾa nia ŋuain tamna takar~ɾur~ɾa.
S.FORM: cʉmʉ'ʉra na tarako isa 'esikara nia nguain tamna takarura.
S.PHON: ʦɨmɨʔɨr~ɾa na tar~ɾako isa ʔesikar~ɾa nia ŋuain tamna takar~ɾur~ɾa.
S.TRANSL: 去看那個樹洞他養的那隻青蛙有沒有在裡面.
He went to see that hole whether his frog was inside there or not.

S.FORM: 'akia.
S.PHON: ʔakia.
S.FORM: 'akia.
S.PHON: ʔakia.
S.TRANSL: 沒有.
There was not.

S.FORM: 'akia takarura moncu nesi manu isi pokari takarura 'esikasu nanu mihee.
S.PHON: ʔakia takar~ɾur~ɾa monʦu nesi manu isi pokar~ɾi takar~ɾur~ɾa ʔesikasu nanu mihee.
S.FORM: 'akia takarura moncu nesi manu isi pokari takarura 'esikasu nanu mihee.
S.PHON: ʔakia takar~ɾur~ɾa monʦu nesi manu isi pokar~ɾi takar~ɾur~ɾa ʔesikasu nanu mihee.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙不在,小孩一直在那個地方一直叫他養的青蛙到底去哪裡?
The frog was not there. The kid kept saying 'where did my frog go?'

S.FORM: ei! arakicacʉ manu isi ararakau puka.
S.PHON: ei! ar~ɾakiʦaʦɨ manu isi ar~ɾar~ɾakau puka.
S.FORM: ei! arakicacʉ manu isi ararakau puka.
S.PHON: ei! ar~ɾakiʦaʦɨ manu isi ar~ɾar~ɾakau puka.
S.TRANSL: 那個貓頭鷹出來了,小朋友嚇了一跳.
The kid was shocked by the coming out of the owl.

S.FORM: ararakau sua puka isi na tarako niaranai na tarako arapapining.
S.PHON: ar~ɾar~ɾakau sua puka isi na tar~ɾako niar~ɾanai na tar~ɾako ar~ɾapapiniŋ.
S.FORM: ararakau sua puka isi na tarako niaranai na tarako arapapining.
S.PHON: ar~ɾar~ɾakau sua puka isi na tar~ɾako niar~ɾanai na tar~ɾako ar~ɾapapiniŋ.
S.TRANSL: 那個貓頭鷹出來,那個小朋友嚇了一跳就跌下來,狗也驚怕到就跑走了.
The owl came out from the hole. It came from the hole to the outside.

S.FORM: matapari'i sua manu isi na 'ʉnʉ'ʉnai careencu.
S.PHON: matapar~ɾiʔi sua manu isi na ʔɨnɨʔɨnai ʦar~ɾeenʦu.
S.FORM: matapari'i sua manu isi na 'ʉnʉ'ʉnai careencu.
S.PHON: matapar~ɾiʔi sua manu isi na ʔɨnɨʔɨnai ʦar~ɾeenʦu.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩從那個樹跌下來 很可憐.
The child fell down to the earth. It is pitiful of him.

S.FORM: manguru nguain tamna tamtitu.
S.PHON: maŋur~ɾu ŋuain tamna tamtitu.
S.FORM: manguru nguain tamna tamtitu.
S.PHON: maŋur~ɾu ŋuain tamna tamtitu.
S.TRANSL: 他的小狗逃走了.
His doggy ran away.

S.FORM: manguru nguain tamna tamtitu ʉngcaa anu kecancancan pariku na tamtitu isi.
S.PHON: maŋur~ɾu ŋuain tamna tamtitu ɨŋʦaa anu keʦanʦanʦan par~ɾiku na tamtitu isi.
S.FORM: manguru nguain tamna tamtitu ʉngcaa anu kecancancan pariku na tamtitu isi.
S.PHON: maŋur~ɾu ŋuain tamna tamtitu ɨŋʦaa anu keʦanʦanʦan par~ɾiku na tamtitu isi.
S.TRANSL: 後來,狗在跑的時候,原來一群蜜蜂就跟著他在追他.
The doggy ran away because it was being chased by a swarm of bees.

S.FORM: pokari arapapining 'una puka.
S.PHON: pokar~ɾi ar~ɾapapiniŋ ʔuna puka.
S.FORM: pokari arapapining 'una puka.
S.PHON: pokar~ɾi ar~ɾapapiniŋ ʔuna puka.

TRANSL.notes: 他後來一直叫(但那隻狗沒有回應),然後貓頭鷹就出來.

S.TRANSL: 他後來一直叫 ,然後貓頭鷹就出來.
He kept calling that dog, and that owl came out.

S.FORM: makahuacu manu isi mopara na karu angʉco na vatu.
S.PHON: makahuaʦu manu isi mopar~ɾa na kar~ɾu aŋɨʦo na vatu.
S.FORM: makahuacu manu isi mopara na karu angʉco na vatu.
S.PHON: makahuaʦu manu isi mopar~ɾa na kar~ɾu aŋɨʦo na vatu.
S.TRANSL: 後來小朋友就爬到樹上…阿不是拉,是石頭上.
Then the kid climbed a tree… oh a stone.

S.FORM: ka'anʉva ka vutun.
S.PHON: kaʔanɨva ka vutun.
S.FORM: ka'anʉva ka vutun.
S.PHON: kaʔanɨva ka vutun.
S.TRANSL: 原來不是,是鹿.
But, it's not a tree. It's a deer.

S.FORM: 'an tavarʉ'ʉ makahi nen ninpara na vatu 'esi vutun nehi.
S.PHON: ʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ makahi nen ninpar~ɾa na vatu ʔesi vutun nehi.
S.FORM: 'an tavarʉ'ʉ makahi nen ninpara na vatu 'esi vutun nehi.
S.PHON: ʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ makahi nen ninpar~ɾa na vatu ʔesi vutun nehi.
S.TRANSL: 他不知道那個鹿還在那裡.
He doesn't know that the deer was still there.

S.FORM: cʉpʉngin ia karu nimacacaa mon na 'inia.
S.PHON: ʦɨpɨŋin ia kar~ɾu nimaʦaʦaa mon na ʔinia.
S.FORM: cʉpʉngin ia karu nimacacaa mon na 'inia.
S.PHON: ʦɨpɨŋin ia kar~ɾu nimaʦaʦaa mon na ʔinia.
S.TRANSL: 他認為說旁邊那顆是樹,他在石頭上.
He thought that was a tree, and he stood above the stone.

S.FORM: makahuacu tamtinu ia 'esi na 'ʉnʉ'ʉnai mon na 'inia 'esi ma'icʉpʉ.
S.PHON: makahuaʦu tamtinu ia ʔesi na ʔɨnɨʔɨnai mon na ʔinia ʔesi maʔiʦɨpɨ.
S.FORM: makahuacu tamtinu ia 'esi na 'ʉnʉ'ʉnai mon na 'inia 'esi ma'icʉpʉ.
S.PHON: makahuaʦu tamtinu ia ʔesi na ʔɨnɨʔɨnai mon na ʔinia ʔesi maʔiʦɨpɨ.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣 小狗在地上,一直在怕.
Therefore, the dog was on the ground, scared very much.

S.FORM: 'e itarʉn kee sua nguain tamna.
S.PHON: ʔe itar~ɾɨn kee sua ŋuain tamna.
S.FORM: 'e itarʉn kee sua nguain tamna.
S.PHON: ʔe itar~ɾɨn kee sua ŋuain tamna.
S.TRANSL: 他在等他的小狗.
He was waiting his dog.

S.FORM: makahi nesi 'esipa ninpara na vatu manu isi ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ vutunuava mihee.
S.PHON: makahi nesi ʔesipa ninpar~ɾa na vatu manu isi kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ vutunuava mihee.
S.FORM: makahi nesi 'esipa ninpara na vatu manu isi ka'an tavarʉ'ʉ vutunuava mihee.
S.PHON: makahi nesi ʔesipa ninpar~ɾa na vatu manu isi kaʔan tavar~ɾɨʔɨ vutunuava mihee.
S.TRANSL: 事情來到這個時候 他還在爬到石頭上 他不知道原來是鹿.
When it came to this moment, the boy was still standing above the stone, he didn't know that was a deer.

S.FORM: makahuacu makasicu sian pokari na tacau isi.
S.PHON: makahuaʦu makasiʦu sian pokar~ɾi na taʦau isi.
S.FORM: makahuacu makasicu sian pokari na tacau isi.
S.PHON: makahuaʦu makasiʦu sian pokar~ɾi na taʦau isi.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣,到這裡.他一直叫他的狗.
Then, the kid kept calling his dog.

S.FORM: 'e pokariinkee manu isa ninpara na vutun.
S.PHON: ʔe pokar~ɾiinkee manu isa ninpar~ɾa na vutun.
S.FORM: 'e pokariinkee manu isa ninpara na vutun.
S.PHON: ʔe pokar~ɾiinkee manu isa ninpar~ɾa na vutun.
S.TRANSL: 狗在叫那小孩子爬到鹿的上面.
The dog was barking at that dog for his mounting the deer.

S.FORM: matapari'i na 'ʉnʉ'ʉnai sua canumu isi tintinivisa ararakau vutun.
S.PHON: matapar~ɾiʔi na ʔɨnɨʔɨnai sua ʦanumu isi tintinivisa ar~ɾar~ɾakau vutun.
S.FORM: matapari'i na 'ʉnʉ'ʉnai sua canumu isi tintinivisa ararakau vutun.
S.PHON: matapar~ɾiʔi na ʔɨnɨʔɨnai sua ʦanumu isi tintinivisa ar~ɾar~ɾakau vutun.
S.TRANSL: 跌在地上 原來是水的邊緣,然後鹿就來.
It fell on the ground, where was the edge of water. The deer came out.

S.FORM: makahuacu sua vutun ihi ia moha na tintinivisa manasU tia manguru mihee aiyo.
S.PHON: makahuaʦu sua vutun ihi ia moha na tintinivisa manasu tia maŋur~ɾu mihee aijo.
S.FORM: makahuacu sua vutun ihi ia moha na tintinivisa manasU tia manguru mihee aiyo.
S.PHON: makahuaʦu sua vutun ihi ia moha na tintinivisa manasu tia maŋur~ɾu mihee aijo.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣,這個鹿跑到邊緣,他以為鹿像是要跑掉.
Then, the deer ran to the edge of the water. It seemed like that the deer wanted to ran away.

S.FORM: tavarʉ'ʉcu manu isa tu isieva ia vutun.
S.PHON: tavar~ɾɨʔɨʦu manu isa tu isieva ia vutun.
S.FORM: tavarʉ'ʉcu manu isa tu isieva ia vutun.
S.PHON: tavar~ɾɨʔɨʦu manu isa tu isieva ia vutun.
S.TRANSL: 小孩知道了 這個原來是鹿.
The kid understood this was a deer!

S.FORM: ka'anʉva karu nimacaca'a matapri'i ha manu mata tamtituin niaranai na vanvaniri matapari'i 'ʉnʉ'ʉnai.
S.PHON: kaʔanɨva kar~ɾu nimaʦaʦaʔa matapr~ɾiʔi ha manu mata tamtituin niar~ɾanai na vanvanir~ɾi matapar~ɾiʔi ʔɨnɨʔɨnai.
S.FORM: ka'anʉva karu nimacaca'a matapri'i ha manu mata tamtituin niaranai na vanvaniri matapari'i 'ʉnʉ'ʉnai.
S.PHON: kaʔanɨva kar~ɾu nimaʦaʦaʔa matapr~ɾiʔi ha manu mata tamtituin niar~ɾanai na vanvanir~ɾi matapar~ɾiʔi ʔɨnɨʔɨnai.
S.TRANSL: 在他發覺不是樹的時候,小朋友和他的小狗就唉唷,從鹿角和斜坡跌到地上.
As he found that wasn't a bushy tree, he and his doggy was stunned and fell on the ground from the antlers and the slope.

S.FORM: makasuacu ma'icʉpʉ sua manu isi mata tamtitu pokariinkee.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu maʔiʦɨpɨ sua manu isi mata tamtitu pokar~ɾiinkee.
S.FORM: makasuacu ma'icʉpʉ sua manu isi mata tamtitu pokariinkee.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu maʔiʦɨpɨ sua manu isi mata tamtitu pokar~ɾiinkee.
S.TRANSL: 這個時候,狗跟那個小朋友一直在害怕,然後他們就一直叫.
Then, both of the kid and the doggy were really afraid. They were crying .

S.FORM: matapari'i nesi na canum.
S.PHON: matapar~ɾiʔi nesi na ʦanum.
S.FORM: matapari'i nesi na canum.
S.PHON: matapar~ɾiʔi nesi na ʦanum.
S.TRANSL: 他們掉在這個水上.
They fell on a pool of water.

S.FORM: nimatapari'i na canumu makasicu canum.
S.PHON: nimatapar~ɾiʔi na ʦanumu makasiʦu ʦanum.
S.FORM: nimatapari'i na canumu makasicu canum.
S.PHON: nimatapar~ɾiʔi na ʦanumu makasiʦu ʦanum.
S.TRANSL: 掉到水中,就這樣子在水中.
therefore fell into the water.

S.FORM: sua tamtitu ia mopara na manu tamna navungu ma'icʉpʉ.
S.PHON: sua tamtitu ia mopar~ɾa na manu tamna navuŋu maʔiʦɨpɨ.
S.FORM: sua tamtitu ia mopara na manu tamna navungu ma'icʉpʉ.
S.PHON: sua tamtitu ia mopar~ɾa na manu tamna navuŋu maʔiʦɨpɨ.
S.TRANSL: 後來小狗因為怕,爬到小朋友頭上.
The dog climbed to the boy and very scared.

S.FORM: mai'icʉpʉ si nimusikarʉ na canum.
S.PHON: maiʔiʦɨpɨ si nimusikar~ɾɨ na ʦanum.
S.FORM: mai'icʉpʉ si nimusikarʉ na canum.
S.PHON: maiʔiʦɨpɨ si nimusikar~ɾɨ na ʦanum.
S.TRANSL: 狗因為掉進水裡面,所以就怕.
The dog was scared due to falling into the water.

S.FORM: makasuacu sua manu isi moon na nesi pokari 'takarura 'esikasu nanu'.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu sua manu isi moon na nesi pokar~ɾi ʔtakar~ɾur~ɾa ʔesikasu nanuʔ.
S.FORM: makasuacu sua manu isi moon na nesi pokari 'takarura 'esikasu nanu'.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu sua manu isi moon na nesi pokar~ɾi ʔtakar~ɾur~ɾa ʔesikasu nanuʔ.
S.TRANSL: 這個時候,小主人就一直叫:「我的青蛙我的青蛙你在哪裡?」
At the time, the boy kept calling the frog, saying 'frog, where are you?'

S.FORM: 'una karu maringuna isi 'una tarako tesikaren.
S.PHON: ʔuna kar~ɾu mar~ɾiŋuna isi ʔuna tar~ɾako tesikar~ɾen.
S.FORM: 'una karu maringuna isi 'una tarako tesikaren.
S.PHON: ʔuna kar~ɾu mar~ɾiŋuna isi ʔuna tar~ɾako tesikar~ɾen.
S.TRANSL: 有一個乾的樹,樹裡有一個洞.
There was a dried tree, inside which there was a hole.

S.FORM: a sua tamtituin 'esi na canumu makananguru tekirim nguain tamna takarura.
S.PHON: a sua tamtituin ʔesi na ʦanumu makanaŋur~ɾu tekir~ɾim ŋuain tamna takar~ɾur~ɾa.
S.FORM: a sua tamtituin 'esi na canumu makananguru tekirim nguain tamna takarura.
S.PHON: a sua tamtituin ʔesi na ʦanumu makanaŋur~ɾu tekir~ɾim ŋuain tamna takar~ɾur~ɾa.
S.TRANSL: 他的小狗在水裡游泳,尋找他的青蛙.
His dog was swimming in the water searching his frog.

S.FORM: mon nesi tamtituin mosikarʉ na vatu karu tarako isi mata manu ihi tu.
S.PHON: mon nesi tamtituin mosikar~ɾɨ na vatu kar~ɾu tar~ɾako isi mata manu ihi tu.
S.FORM: mon nesi tamtituin mosikarʉ na vatu karu tarako isi mata manu ihi tu.
S.PHON: mon nesi tamtituin mosikar~ɾɨ na vatu kar~ɾu tar~ɾako isi mata manu ihi tu.
S.TRANSL: 他自己跟他的小狗在這裡,叫小狗進到樹洞裡.
He and his dog entered the tree hole.

S.FORM: takarura takarura 'esikasu nan 'mehen 'akia'.
S.PHON: takar~ɾur~ɾa takar~ɾur~ɾa ʔesikasu nan ʔmehen ʔakiaʔ.
S.FORM: takarura takarura 'esikasu nan 'mehen 'akia'.
S.PHON: takar~ɾur~ɾa takar~ɾur~ɾa ʔesikasu nan ʔmehen ʔakiaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 兩個一直同時說:「青蛙青蛙你在哪裡?」
Both they said, 'Frog, frog where are you?'

S.FORM: makasicu tekirikiriminkee kipapapa na karu maringuna ihi.
S.PHON: makasiʦu tekir~ɾikir~ɾiminkee kipapapa na kar~ɾu mar~ɾiŋuna ihi.
S.FORM: makasicu tekirikiriminkee kipapapa na karu maringuna ihi.
S.PHON: makasiʦu tekir~ɾikir~ɾiminkee kipapapa na kar~ɾu mar~ɾiŋuna ihi.
S.TRANSL: 他們沿著樹的周邊一直在找.
They were keeping searching the frog around the tree.

S.FORM: ninpara tamtitu mata manu isi na karu pokari tu 'esikasu nanu takarura arapapiningacu.
S.PHON: ninpar~ɾa tamtitu mata manu isi na kar~ɾu pokar~ɾi tu ʔesikasu nanu takar~ɾur~ɾa ar~ɾapapiniŋaʦu.
S.FORM: ninpara tamtitu mata manu isi na karu pokari tu 'esikasu nanu takarura arapapiningacu.
S.PHON: ninpar~ɾa tamtitu mata manu isi na kar~ɾu pokar~ɾi tu ʔesikasu nanu takar~ɾur~ɾa ar~ɾapapiniŋaʦu.
S.TRANSL: 後來狗跟小孩爬到乾樹上說:「青蛙青蛙你在哪?請你出來.」
The doggy and the boy climbed the dried tree saying, 'where are you frog? Come out, please!'

S.FORM: 'anpa arapapining arapapining arakicacʉ.
S.PHON: ʔanpa ar~ɾapapiniŋ ar~ɾapapiniŋ ar~ɾakiʦaʦɨ.
S.FORM: 'anpa arapapining arapapining arakicacʉ.
S.PHON: ʔanpa ar~ɾapapiniŋ ar~ɾapapiniŋ ar~ɾakiʦaʦɨ.
S.TRANSL: 這青蛙一直沒有出來.牠一出來的時候他們嚇了一跳.
The frog didn't come out for some time. They were shocked when the frog suddenly appeared.

S.FORM: manu isa mata tamtituava 'esi takarura mecocua.
S.PHON: manu isa mata tamtituava ʔesi takar~ɾur~ɾa meʦoʦua.
S.FORM: manu isa mata tamtituava 'esi takarura mecocua.
S.PHON: manu isa mata tamtituava ʔesi takar~ɾur~ɾa meʦoʦua.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和小狗看見青蛙原來兩隻在一起.
The kid and the doggy found that the frog had been walking with another frog!

S.FORM: isiava nimta takarura ihi tekirim karʉen.
S.PHON: isiava nimta takar~ɾur~ɾa ihi tekir~ɾim kar~ɾɨen.
S.FORM: isiava nimta takarura ihi tekirim karʉen.
S.PHON: isiava nimta takar~ɾur~ɾa ihi tekir~ɾim kar~ɾɨen.
S.TRANSL: 原來他失蹤了這個青蛙找到他的愛人.
It was because that his lost frog had found his frog lover.

S.FORM: aiyo itumuru karʉen cʉrʉʉn itumuru macangcangarʉ manu isi ('es)i na vatu mata tamtitu.
S.PHON: aijo itumur~ɾu kar~ɾɨen ʦɨr~ɾɨɨn itumur~ɾu maʦaŋʦaŋar~ɾɨ manu isi (ʔes)i na vatu mata tamtitu.
S.FORM: aiyo itumuru karʉen cʉrʉʉn itumuru macangcangarʉ manu isi ('es)i na vatu mata tamtitu.
S.PHON: aijo itumur~ɾu kar~ɾɨen ʦɨr~ɾɨɨn itumur~ɾu maʦaŋʦaŋar~ɾɨ manu isi (ʔes)i na vatu mata tamtitu.
S.TRANSL: 真的,原來這個青蛙在離開我們的時候,認識了很多他的朋友,兩位很高興地站在石頭上.
Oops, so many lovers were seen by the boy and his doggy who were happy standing on the rock.

S.FORM: cʉ'ʉrʉʉnkee takaruren cucurova takaruramita ia tenikirim karʉen.
S.PHON: ʦɨʔɨr~ɾɨɨnkee takar~ɾur~ɾen ʦuʦur~ɾova takar~ɾur~ɾamita ia tenikir~ɾim kar~ɾɨen.
S.FORM: cʉ'ʉrʉʉnkee takaruren cucurova takaruramita ia tenikirim karʉen.
S.PHON: ʦɨʔɨr~ɾɨɨnkee takar~ɾur~ɾen ʦuʦur~ɾova takar~ɾur~ɾamita ia tenikir~ɾim kar~ɾɨen.
S.TRANSL: 他看到他們青蛙,原來我們的青蛙找到了他的愛人!
He saw his frog. Our frog had found its lover!

S.FORM: tekirim karʉen takarura kangvang.
S.PHON: tekir~ɾim kar~ɾɨen takar~ɾur~ɾa kaŋvaŋ.
S.FORM: tekirim karʉen takarura kangvang.
S.PHON: tekir~ɾim kar~ɾɨen takar~ɾur~ɾa kaŋvaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他找的愛人也是青蛙.
The lover it found was also a frog.

S.FORM: kecancancan 'ancu ʉtʉʉnkee nguain tamna tamtitu mata tacau si isiava nimʉtʉa karʉen apakarʉrʉ'ʉ nesi na kakarʉen.
S.PHON: keʦanʦanʦan ʔanʦu ɨtɨɨnkee ŋuain tamna tamtitu mata taʦau si isiava nimɨtɨa kar~ɾɨen apakar~ɾɨr~ɾɨʔɨ nesi na kakar~ɾɨen.
S.FORM: kecancancan 'ancu ʉtʉʉnkee nguain tamna tamtitu mata tacau si isiava nimʉtʉa karʉen apakarʉrʉ'ʉ nesi na kakarʉen.
S.PHON: keʦanʦanʦan ʔanʦu ɨtɨɨnkee ŋuain tamna tamtitu mata taʦau si isiava nimɨtɨa kar~ɾɨen apakar~ɾɨr~ɾɨʔɨ nesi na kakar~ɾɨen.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙們一起在走.他似乎不認識了他的小主人和狗,因為他找到了很多的朋友彼此都很友好.
The frog was getting along with other frogs well. It seemed not to see its master and the dog, because it had found many other good friends.

S.FORM: 'ancu tia moha na tanasa makahia manu mata tamtitu.
S.PHON: ʔanʦu tia moha na tanasa makahia manu mata tamtitu.
S.FORM: 'ancu tia moha na tanasa makahia manu mata tamtitu.
S.PHON: ʔanʦu tia moha na tanasa makahia manu mata tamtitu.
S.TRANSL: 小主人跟小狗這樣想:「這個青蛙不想回家.」
'The frog would not like to go home,' the kid and the doggy thought.

S.FORM: takarura mocacukita tanasa sua karʉansu makinanu mon sian.
S.PHON: takar~ɾur~ɾa moʦaʦukita tanasa sua kar~ɾɨansu makinanu mon sian.
S.FORM: takarura mocacukita tanasa sua karʉansu makinanu mon sian.
S.PHON: takar~ɾur~ɾa moʦaʦukita tanasa sua kar~ɾɨansu makinanu mon sian.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙,我們回家.你的朋友待在這裡沒關係的.
Let's go, frog. It's ok that your lover stay here.

W.TRANSL: 主焦-走=改變狀態=1PL.主格.排除

S.FORM: makahua ci sosomanpe sosomanpe karʉa takarura.
S.PHON: makahua ʦi sosomanpe sosomanpe kar~ɾɨa takar~ɾur~ɾa.
S.FORM: makahua ci sosomanpe sosomanpe karʉa takarura.
S.PHON: makahua ʦi sosomanpe sosomanpe kar~ɾɨa takar~ɾur~ɾa.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣,他們就說謝謝.
Then, they just thanked his frog's lover.
